name: extester-runner
description: Extension for vscode-extension-tester which allow users to run, debug, list tests directly inside VS Code.

walkthroughs.title: Get started with ExTester Runner
walkthroughs.description: Step-by-step guide to quickly setu up and start using ExTerster Runner

steps.title: Configure TypeScript (tsconfig.json)
steps.description: Set the location of your [tsconfig.json](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22extesterRunner.TSConfig%22) file to define how your tests are compiled.

steps.title: (Optional) Set Root and Output Directories
steps.description: Root and out directories are loaded from TS Config file but optionally you override this and sets different [root](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22extesterRunner.rootFolder%22) and [out](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22extesterRunner.outFolder%22) for test compilation.

steps.title: Specify Test File Pattern
steps.description: Define the glob pattern for locating your test files using [testFileGlob](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22extesterRunner.testFileGlob%22).

steps.title: Set Excluded Paths
steps.description: Define paths to exclude from your test file search with [excludeGlob](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22extesterRunner.excludeGlob%22).

steps.title: (Optional) Customize Displayed Path Segments
steps.description: Optionally configure segments of paths to ignore in test views using [ignorePathPart](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22extesterRunner.ignorePathPart%22).

steps.title: Explore Additional Settings
steps.description: Explore more configuration options available in the [settings](command:workbench.action.openSettings?%22extesterRunner%22).

colors.description: The color used for the 'only' modifier.
The color used for the 'skip' modifier.

extesterRunner.testFileGlob.markdownDescription: Glob pattern to locate test files in the workspace. Default: `**/ui-test/**/*.test.ts`.

extesterRunner.excludeGlob.markdownDescription: Glob pattern to exclude specific paths from test file search. Default: `**/node_modules/**`.

extesterRunner.ignorePathPart.markdownDescription: Pattern to hide specific segments of folder paths in the test view. Matching parts will be removed from displayed paths.

extesterRunner.TSConfig.markdownDescription: Specifies the TypeScript configuration file used for compilation. Default: `tsconfig.json`. This setting is used to determine `outDir` and `rootDir` from the TypeScript project configuration.

extesterRunner.rootFolder.markdownDescription: Specifies the root directory (`rootDir`) of the TypeScript source files. If not explicitly set, the value is derived from `tsconfig.json` (if available). If `rootDir` is undefined, TypeScript infers it automatically.

extesterRunner.outFolder.markdownDescription: Defines the output directory (`outDir`) where compiled JavaScript files are stored after TypeScript transpilation. If not explicitly set, the value is derived from `tsconfig.json` (if available). If `outDir` is undefined in both, `out` is used.

extesterRunner.tempFolder.markdownDescription: Specifies the directory for temporary files used by ExTester. If undefined, the default system temporary folder is used. This setting overrides any corresponding [environment variables](https://github.com/redhat-developer/vscode-extension-tester/wiki/Test-Setup#useful-env-variables).

extesterRunner.visualStudioCode.Version.markdownDescription: Specifies the VS Code version. Options: `max`, `min`, `latest`, or a specific version (e.g., `1.97.1`). Default: `max` (max version supported by ExTester). This setting overrides any corresponding [environment variables](https://github.com/redhat-developer/vscode-extension-tester/wiki/Test-Setup#useful-env-variables).

extesterRunner.visualStudioCode.Type.markdownDescription: Defines the VS Code distribution. Use `stable` (default) for the official, fully tested release with monthly updates, or `insider` for a preview version with daily updates and experimental features (potentially unstable). See [VS Code Insiders page](https://code.visualstudio.com/insiders/) for more info. This setting overrides any corresponding [environment variables](https://github.com/redhat-developer/vscode-extension-tester/wiki/Test-Setup#useful-env-variables).

extesterRunner.additionalArgs.markdownDescription:
Additional arguments for the ExTester `setup-and-run` command.

See [ExTester wiki](https://github.com/redhat-developer/vscode-extension-tester/wiki/Test-Setup#set-up-and-run-tests) for more details.

extesterRunner.hideEmptyLogFolders.markdownDescription: Hides empty log directories in the test results. If enabled (`true`), only folders containing any log files will be displayed. If disabled (`false`), all log folders, including empty ones, will be visible.

commands.title: Run Folder
commands.tooltip: Run all test files inside folder.

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
